title: Trading Lab Workspace
summary: Paper-only trading workflow using mock data. This panel explains the flow without connecting to a broker or placing orders.

external_trading_platforms.label: External Trading Platforms
external_trading_platforms.path: Trading Lab -> Tools / Connectors -> External Trading Platforms -> MetaTrader 5 / TradingView / TradersPost
progression_gates: User reviews Signal Intake / Risk Gate.
User may view MetaTrader 5 / TradingView / TradersPost planning cards.
Any real login or connection remains blocked until future approval.

cards.title: Signal Intake
cards.meaning: A sample trading signal can be reviewed without sending orders.

cards.title: Latency
cards.meaning: Latency means how long it took for a signal to be noticed. This is mock timing only.
cards.next_action: Confirm the timestamp labels are readable.

cards.title: Regime
cards.meaning: Regime means the market condition tag, such as trend, range, or unknown.

cards.title: Risk Gate
cards.meaning: The safety gate blocks live action and keeps the lab in review mode.
cards.next_action: Do not weaken the safety lock.

cards.title: Paper Result
cards.meaning: No trade result is real. This card will show simulated outcomes only.
cards.next_action: Use a mock result before any scorecard note.

cards.title: Scorecard
cards.meaning: The scorecard summarizes mock win/loss notes after enough samples exist.
cards.next_action: Require enough mock samples before judging an idea.

cards.title: Validator Status
cards.meaning: Validators check that JSON parses and safety locks remain visible.
cards.next_action: Run local checks after each approved edit.

cards.title: Next Action
cards.meaning: The safest next step is to review one mock signal through the risk gate.
